global_description: Tall, cylindrical vehicle with a pointed nose cone, metallic body, often white with red or black accents, featuring fins at the base, and exhaust nozzles for propulsion.

part_details.body: Cylindrical, metallic, often white with accents
part_details.exhaust nozzles: Located at the bottom, for propulsion
part_details.paint: White with red or black accents

spatial_relations: Nose cone at top of body
